packages.summary: Sri Lanka is a vibrant island nation known for its diverse landscapes, rich culture, bustling cities and historical landmarks. Explore lush tea plantations, towering mountains and scenic coastlines, while immersing yourself in vibrant markets, ancient temples and the warmth of local hospitality. Unwind with tranquil beach escapes and peaceful backwater journeys along the way.

activities: Arrive in Colombo and transfer to hotel
itinerary.description: Upon arrival at Bandaranaike International Airport, our guide will transfer you to Colombo. Enjoy scenic city views, explore colonial architecture, visit the Gangaramaya Temple and stroll along Galle Face Green.

activities: Visit Temple of the Tooth Relic
itinerary.description: Travel to Kandy, the cultural capital of Sri Lanka. Visit the sacred Temple of the Tooth Relic, explore the Royal Botanical Gardens at Peradeniya and enjoy a cultural dance show in the evening.
Journey through misty mountains to Ella on the scenic train ride. Walk the Nine Arch Bridge, hike Little Adam's Peak and soak in the highland atmosphere of this picturesque village.

inclusions_full: Accommodation as listed or similar on double sharing basis
Tours as mentioned with an English speaking guide
Entrance fees for the activities as outlined
Inclusive of all government taxes and service charges
packages.title: 10 Days – Sri Lanka Dream Route
conditions: Prices are per person based on double occupancy
Cancellation policies apply as per terms

reviews.name: Sarah & James Thompson
reviews.text: Absolutely incredible trip! The Nine Arch Bridge was even more breathtaking than the photos. Our guide was knowledgeable, friendly and went above and beyond. The train journey through the tea plantations was the highlight of our trip.

reviews.name: Rajesh Patel
reviews.text: Outstanding service from start to finish. The team arranged everything perfectly. Sri Lanka is a gem of a destination and this tour package covered all the must-see places beautifully.

packages.summary: Discover the full breadth of Sri Lanka over 12 incredible days. From ancient rock fortresses and cultural cities to misty highlands and pristine beaches, this comprehensive tour takes you on an unforgettable journey through the island's most iconic destinations.

itinerary.description: Arrive in Colombo and settle into your hotel. Explore the city's vibrant neighbourhoods, colonial landmarks and bustling markets in the afternoon.
Head to the cultural triangle and climb the ancient Sigiriya Rock Fortress, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Explore the frescoes and the stunning panoramic views from the top.

Tours as mentioned with an English speaking guide

Inclusive of all government taxes and service charges
packages.title: A 12-Day Island Adventure Awaits
conditions: Prices are per person based on double occupancy

reviews.name: Emily Chen
reviews.text: An amazing 12 day adventure through Sri Lanka. Every detail was perfectly planned. Sigiriya was absolutely breathtaking and the beach days in Galle were the perfect way to end the trip.

packages.summary: The ultimate Sri Lanka experience crafted for those who want to immerse deeply in every corner of this magical island. From the ancient cultural triangle to misty hill country and golden beaches, 14 days of pure discovery await.
packages.cities: Colombo, Sigiriya, Kandy, Nuwara Eliya, Ella, Galle

itinerary.description: Begin your intimate Sri Lanka journey with a warm welcome at Colombo airport and a luxury transfer to your hotel. Enjoy a sunset cocktail with views of the Indian Ocean.

packages.summary: Bali is the Island of the Gods — a place of extraordinary beauty, spiritual energy and warm hospitality. Explore lush rice terraces, sacred temples and vibrant arts before unwinding on world-class beaches.

itinerary.description: Arrive in Bali and transfer to the cultural heart of Ubud. Visit the Sacred Monkey Forest, explore local art galleries and enjoy a traditional Kecak dance performance.

packages.summary: Dubai is a city of superlatives — the tallest buildings, the most extravagant malls and the most thrilling desert adventures. Experience the perfect blend of ultramodern luxury and rich Arabian heritage on this action-packed 7-day tour.

packages.summary: The Maldives is the ultimate tropical paradise — a collection of 26 atolls adorned with turquoise lagoons, pristine white sand beaches and spectacular coral reefs. Perfect for honeymooners and beach lovers seeking absolute tranquility.

itinerary.travelTime: Airport to Resort – 45 mins by speedboat

packages.summary: Vietnam is a vibrant Southeast Asian country known for its diverse landscapes, rich culture, bustling cities and historical landmarks. Explore lush valleys, towering mountains and scenic coastlines, while immersing yourself in vibrant markets, ancient temples and the warmth of local hospitality.

activities: Arrive in Hanoi and transfer to hotel
itinerary.description: Upon arrival at Noi Bai airport, our guide will transfer you to the heart of Hanoi. Enjoy scenic views, experience local culture, access historical sites and engage in recreational activities.

activities: Boat ride in Ha Long Bay
itinerary.description: Get lost in the stunning landscape of Ha Long Bay, where you can admire the limestone karsts, experience water activities like kayaking and swimming, explore hidden caves and islands.

itinerary.travelTime: Ha Long Bay to Hanoi – 3 hours
itinerary.description: Ha Long Bay, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, invites you to explore stunning geological formations and experience its natural beauty while practicing Tai Chi on the sundeck.

reviews.name: Professor Jayanath Colombage
reviews.text: I came to Vietnam for a personal tour with my wife. Everything was organized by AEON Travels and Tours. We have been having a great time in Hanoi and we have explored all the key monuments in Hanoi city and the old quarter. The service was exceptional throughout.

packages.summary: Cambodia's magnificent temples, rich history and warm-hearted people make it one of Southeast Asia's most compelling destinations. The awe-inspiring Angkor Wat complex is just the beginning of what this extraordinary country has to offer.

packages.summary: The southern coast of Sri Lanka is home to some of the most beautiful beaches in Asia. Combine the whale-watching paradise of Mirissa with the golden sands and coral reefs of Unawatuna for an unforgettable beach escape.

itinerary.description: Travel to the southern coast and settle into your beachfront hotel in Mirissa. Spend the afternoon on the beautiful crescent-shaped beach and enjoy fresh seafood for dinner.

packages.summary: Kandy is the cultural capital of Sri Lanka and home to the sacred Temple of the Tooth Relic. This short but enriching getaway takes you through the city's royal history, botanical wonders and vibrant cultural performances.

itinerary.description: Travel from Colombo to Kandy through the scenic central highlands. Visit the renowned Royal Botanical Gardens at Peradeniya and settle in for an evening cultural show.
